notes: cli-gating hook is LIVE. If it false-blocks you: `touch ~/.claude/cli-gating.off`, do your work, investigate the pattern, fix `gate_cli_actions.py`, add a test case to `test-gates.sh`, re-enable. Don't just leave it disabled.
`gh` WRITE verbs (incl. `gh pr create`, `gh pr merge`) will gate. If you need to create a PR this session, expect the hook to block — confirm with the user + re-issue, or use the `.off` marker.
